articles.title: Alleged BTC Ponzi Scheme Mastermind Disappears With $6,000,000 of Investors’ Funds
articles.description: An alleged Bitcoin pyramid scheme has collapsed while the mastermind behind it has disappeared with over $6 million of investors’ funds. According to Zimbabwe’s The Sunday Mail, Martin Mhlanga – creator of the alleged pyramid scheme CryptoShares – has vanished, and his South African registered mobile number is unavailable. CryptoShares also has no known physical […]

articles.title: Institutional interest in Litecoin on the rise, Grayscale Litecoin Trust up by 32%
articles.description: Institutional interest in Litecoin is on the rise. While it is known as the “silver” to Bitcoin’s gold, that narrative is changing. It looks like Litecoin might be standing independently, since institutions and retail investors alike, are starting to see potential in it. Grayscale Litecoin Trust (LTCN), after over a month, finally witnessed some gains […]

articles.title: Attorney Hints The Documents SEC’s Refusing To Turn Over Could Potentially End Legal Scuffle With Ripple
articles.description: Further developments in the case between the SEC and Ripple have led to renewed confidence that a conclusion may soon be reached.
